general_feedback: All six filled-in @return tags accurately describe what each method produces. They specify the precise return type (e.g., `CC[A]`, `CC[K, V]`) using backticks per Scaladoc conventions, start with a lowercase article, and remain concise. The descriptions are consistent in style with surrounding documentation (e.g., the `from[K, V]` description mirrors the pre-existing `fromSpecific` @return wording). The `newBuilder` and `mapFactory` returns correctly identify the produced types (`Builder` and `Factory`) using backticks.
